content.raw:
{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"marks":[],"value":"Among the roses, searching for thrips
I fear it's inevitable as History
By the time our grandchildren are old
This place will be baked back to scrub","nodeType":"text"}],"nodeType":"paragraph"},{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"marks":[],"value":"The papers on the garden bench proclaim
In black and white that black is white
All's "force and fraud" apathy and greed
The future still the creature of the past","nodeType":"text"}],"nodeType":"paragraph"},{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"marks":[],"value":"I dead-head, petals fall delicate
As democracy as civilisation itself
Ineluctable as global warming
At this margin only weeds will flower","nodeType":"text"}],"nodeType":"paragraph"},{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"marks":[],"value":"But like a cicada in the history-bird's beak
Poetry must protest to the death - beyond that.","nodeType":"text"}],"nodeType":"paragraph"},{"data":{},"content":[{"data":{},"marks":[],"value":"
","nodeType":"text"}],"nodeType":"paragraph"}],"nodeType":"document"}
